scenarios.title: Professional Buyer
scenarios.primary_goal: Find the best product offer at the best total cost with a professional procurement decision trail.

scenarios.title: Multi Supplier RFQ
scenarios.primary_goal: Compare supplier answers to a request for quotation and produce a ranked buyer recommendation.

scenarios.title: Price Watch
scenarios.primary_goal: Track live price movement and alert when a buy threshold is reached.

scenarios.title: Category Restock Optimizer
scenarios.primary_goal: Decide where and when to restock a category while minimizing total landed cost and supplier risk.
